title: Play, Do, Go — Hobby Rules
description: Why we PLAY tennis but DO yoga but GO swimming. Three verbs, three categories.
summary_pt_br: Três verbos que viram hobbies em inglês: PLAY para esportes de bola / jogos / instrumentos. DO para atividades físicas sem bola (yoga, karate). GO + -ING para atividades (go swimming, go running). Regra simples, fácil de errar.

scenes.text_en:
'I PLAY the piano. I PLAY tennis. I PLAY video games.
I DO yoga. I DO karate. I DO my homework.
I GO SWIMMING. I GO RUNNING. I GO SHOPPING.'
Three verbs, three categories. Memorize.
scenes.text_pt:
'TOCO piano. JOGO tênis. JOGO videogame.
FAÇO yoga. FAÇO karatê. FAÇO a lição.
VOU NADAR. VOU CORRER. VOU ÀS COMPRAS.'
Três verbos, três categorias. Decorar.

scenes.title: The three patterns
scenes.body_en: PLAY + ball sports / games / instruments (tennis, chess, guitar). DO + physical activity without ball / duty (yoga, karate, homework). GO + -ING for motion/activities (swimming, shopping, running). 'I go swim' is WRONG — always 'I go swimming'.
scenes.body_pt: PLAY = bola/jogos/instrumentos. DO = atividade física sem bola, tarefa. GO + -ING = atividades. 'I go swim' é ERRADO. Sempre 'go swimming'.

examples.en: I play tennis. I do yoga. I go running.

exercise.explanation: Five common chunks. Use them whole.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome to the hobby club. What do you enjoy?
turns.pt: Bem-vindo ao clube. Do que gosta?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I play tennis and I go swimming.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice combination. Do you play any instruments?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I play the guitar a little.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No, but I do martial arts.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I go hiking every Sunday.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Perfect. Let me sign you up for three clubs.
turns.pt: Perfeito. Vou te inscrever em três clubes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you. I am excited to start.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Play, Do, Go — Hobby Rules". Why we PLAY tennis but DO yoga but GO swimming. Three verbs, three categories. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Play, Do, Go — Hobby Rules". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Play, Do, Go — Hobby Rules'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Play, Do, Go — Hobby Rules".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
